name: Inside 18 || Golf & Sport Simulator
about: Inside 18 at Spooky Nook Sports Hamilton offers a golf and multi-sport simulator experience with multiple bays for hourly rental. The venue features high-definition technology and supports various sports beyond golf, including baseball, soccer, and football. Pricing is structured by the hour, with options for weekday, weekend, and monthly memberships. It is suited for individuals, groups, and private events, with amenities like food and beverage service available from on-site outlets.
why_golfers_like_it: Over a dozen sports options available
Ability to track progress through E6 Golf account
Food and drinks served directly to the simulator bay

food_and_drink.notes: Available from on-site outlets including The Hydraulic Bar, Forklift & Palate, and Municipal Brew Works; no outside food permitted in bays.
Available from on-site outlets including The Hydraulic Bar, Forklift & Palate, and Municipal Brew Works; no outside beverages permitted in bays.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available for $5/set if you don't have your own. All other sport equipment is included with the rental fee.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverage is permitted in the bays. However, food and drinks purchased from on-site outlets like The Hydraulic Bar, Forklift & Palate, or Municipal Brew Works are allowed inside.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The minimum rental time is 60 minutes per hour, but booking multiple hours in a row is possible. The time to complete 18 holes depends on the player's pace and simulator settings.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue encourages family-friendly play and requires at least one guest aged 18 or older during the booking. Simulators offer interactive gameplay suitable for guests of all ages.
